entities.name: Datachain
entities.description: A blockchain designed for storing data; focuses on keeping data onchain affordably and enabling large quantities of data to be stored onchain at lower costs than typical execution-heavy blockchains such as Ethereum or Solana.

entities.name: Economical onchain storage
entities.description: The need for economical onchain storage that early datachains aimed to solve.

entities.description: Blockchain optimized for executing smart contracts where storage is expensive.

entities.description: A system into which stored data can drive and interact, enabling versatility and usefulness.
